title: Creative Party Chevron Pattern Treat Cups-6 Pcs, Paper, Candy Pink, One Size
features: Package includes: 6 Chevron Pattern Treat Cups - 2.5" x 3.5"
These treat cups features white cups with a pink chevron pattern
These treat cups are ideal for sweet treats buffet table
Use these paper cups to reduce clean-up time
Match it with other chevron tableware and party decorations
description: Decorate your sweet treats buffet with these chevron pattern treat cups. Stack these cups in your sweet treats buffet so that kids can easily get their favorite treats.
